description: S44N - 14 Day Trial UI: Create trial_banner_widget.dart and fully replace subscription_screen.dart. Add trial banner to settings_screen.dart at top.
steps: Create frontend/lib/presentation/widgets/common/trial_banner_widget.dart - A ConsumerStatefulWidget that reads 'trial_start_date' from FlutterSecureStorage on init. Calculates days remaining: 14 - (DateTime.now().difference(trialStart).inDays). Shows active state with gradient background (persian 20% opacity to bgSecondary), persian border, 'Pro Trial Active' heading in DM Serif Display 20px, days remaining count, '$9.99/month' price text, Upgrade button (navigates to subscription route), and a LinearProgressIndicator showing trial progress (daysElapsed/14). If trial_start_date is null or expired (>=14 days), shows expired state with error colors, 'Your trial ended' text, and 'Upgrade now' button. Widget is self-contained and handles its own loading state.

Replace frontend/lib/presentation/screens/settings/subscription_screen.dart - Full screen with AppBar 'Subscription'. Section 1: Current plan card showing the active plan name and status. Section 2: Plan cards matching onboarding page 7 pattern (_buildPlanCard) with Free ($0), Basic ($4.99/mo), and Pro ($9.99/mo) with feature lists. Section 3: 'Manage subscription' tile that launches Stripe portal via url_launcher, and 'Cancel subscription' tile with confirmation AlertDialog. Follow existing screen patterns (ConsumerStatefulWidget, isDark, AppColors, GoogleFonts).

Update frontend/lib/presentation/screens/settings/settings_screen.dart - Import TrialBannerWidget. Add it as the very first item in the ListView children list (before the ACCOUNT section header). It will self-hide when not applicable.
acceptance_criteria: trial_banner_widget.dart exists and compiles with strict null safety
Banner reads trial_start_date from FlutterSecureStorage and calculates remaining days
Banner shows active state (gradient, progress bar, days remaining) when trial is active
Banner shows expired state (error colors, upgrade button) when trial has ended
Banner hides completely when trial_start_date is null (user never started trial)
subscription_screen.dart has AppBar 'Subscription', current plan card, plan cards section, and manage/cancel section
Cancel subscription shows confirmation dialog before action
settings_screen.dart shows TrialBannerWidget at the very top of the ListView
verification: Run flutter analyze in frontend/ directory and confirm no errors
